description: Style Noteshree kurta for the authentic Desi vibe. Get your summer prints right with this lovely printed piece. Pair it with airy patialas to nail that Punjabi look, or style it with stretchy leggings for all day comfort. We recommend pairing this simply styled kurta with a blingy pair of leggings or chudidhar for a grand occasion. An ethnic pair of chandelier earrings and you're set to go.Product DetailsBrown kurta with pink and mustard print, has a close round neck with a half buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves and side slitsMaterial and CareBlended fabricHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
